Volatile.reasoning: Mean reversion in high volatility with RSI2 indicating oversold conditions

Bearish.reasoning: Calm oversold condition in downtrend — RSI2 and ATR filter exclude false signals

Bullish.entry_condition: Close > SMA_20 and RSI2 < 20 and MACD_hist > 0
Bullish.reasoning: Buying pullbacks in confirmed uptrend; RSI2 below 20 ensures oversold entry with MACD momentum

Neutral.entry_condition: SMA_20 > SMA_50 and RSI > 52 and RSI < 62
Neutral.exit_condition: SMA_20 < SMA_50 or RSI > 70 or RSI < 46
